body.p: SequoiaDB database is a kind of new corporation distributed non-relation database. It helps corporation to reduce IT cost, and provides a steady, dependable, efficient and flexible underlying platform.

ul.li: c/c++/c#/php/java/python driver added SSL security communication interface.
sdb/sdbexprt/sdbimprt/sdbtop/sdbinspect/sdblobtool tools added SSL security communication mechanism.
Add --auth parameter to manage database authorizing's on/off.
Database pre-fetch function will be off by default.
Database backend regular flushing dirty pages.
Provides MongoDB compatibility driver.
Database provides REST operation access interfaces.
Provides data encrypting transmission based on SSL.
Provides operations of replica-group manually decreasing replicas.
Provides data replica-group nodes' weighted voting function.
When creating Collection, we can use AutoIndexId:true/false to control on/off of OID indexing.
PostgreSQLconnecting multiple Coordnodes.
Java driver connecting pool supporting dynamic adding Coord address.
sdbexprt exporting tool added filter conditions and sorting field.
sdbexprt supports exporting binary and regex format result.
SequoiaDB supports two deploying modes ofhostnameand ip.
Database selector supports $include, $default, $slice, $elemMatch, $elemMatchOne, $aliasoperations.
Sdbexprt/sdbimprt exporting/importing CSV format file, now supports”ObjectID”,”Binary Data”, “Regular Expression”.
Provides optimized auto-installing & deploying tool(OM)
Provides LOB import/export tool.
Add Python driver
Add LOB's C++, Java ,C# and Python driver.
Node started by sdbcm/sdbstart will switch to SequoiaDB installing account automatically.
Sdb object adds db.createCoordRG()、db.getCoordRG()、db.removeCoordRG()、db.getCatalogRG()、collection.findOne()、collection.putLob()、collection.getLob()、collection.deleteLob()、collection.listLobs()
Large Object (LOB) R/W function, supports storing data larger than 16MB (like images, films).
Automatic installation and deployment, web-based installing guide.
Add findOne() interface, improve query performance.
Field fixed of access plan, add Run: true/false to decide whether an access plan need to process.
Provides cluster data consistency check function.
Provides forceSession function.
Add invalidateCache that allows users to clear cache information of a node externally.
Coord adds the Catalog management, and can create new Coord using a Coord.
Use sdb tool to connect cm directly, it can create standalone, coord and om nodes, and can start/stop nodes as well.
Optimize the storage process, add function that storage process inherit authentication information of current session, and errors in storage process can be get from sdb.
SequoiaDB will automatic switch to sdbadmin when operate in root account.
Transaction optimizing of master node election, decrease replicas, exit and start.
Regular expression start with ^ will match the index, like in SQL statement can match the index as well.
Optimizing of sdblist, sdbstart and sdbstop
